title: MyTiers Tier Tagger
description: Displaying tiers using the MyTiers API.
body:
# MyTiers Tier Tagger

This mod displays tiers above players' heads, embedding them into the player's name tag. It only works in conjunction with [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

The mod gets real-time data about players' tiers from the public [MyTiers API](https://mytiers.ru/) and displays it above players' heads. Supports configuration via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).

Supported versions: **Minecraft 1.20.x — 1.21.8**.

![Nametag overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da4a11da32fcce93334f57093f89144084cf79bb.png)

You can also use the command. It displays detailed player statistics in the chat: tiers on different kits and their position in the overall ranking.
```
/mytiers info <nickname>
```
![Command overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bb45074603e4d91e68ef20d5c538d934deea1a2.png)
